title: 3Powers agent backend — Claude Code (claude.yaml)
description: Declarative manifest the native executive builds the Claude Code invocation from.

agent.description: Display name (defaults to the file stem).

family.description: Model family for the diversity precheck; empty when it depends on the selected model (BYOK).

headless.description: Whether the agent is dispatchable with no interactive IDE (default true).

model_flag.description: Flag that pins a model (e.g. --model); omit when no model is configured.

prompt_flag.description: Flag that precedes the prompt (e.g. -p); null for a positional prompt.

prompt_via.description: How the assembled prompt reaches the agent (default arg).

new_session_args.description: No-resume / new-session flag(s) appended so each dispatch is a clean session.

usage_mode.description: Opt-in structured output: when set (e.g. 'json') usage_mode_args are appended so usage is machine-readable.

usage_mode_args.description: The backend's structured-output flag(s) appended when usage_mode is set.

flag.description: CLI flag carrying the sub-agent directive (e.g. --agents).

arg.description: Template whose $MODEL is replaced with the resolved sub-agent model id.

usage.description: How the backend reports token usage/cost (advisory; never enters the verdict).

source.description: Resolution taxonomy: inline-json (usage rides the run's structured output), session-file (on-disk artifact), regex (parse prose; last resort), none.

strategy.description: Legacy, superseded by `source` (json -> inline-json, regex -> regex).

field.description: Single dotted path into a JSON usage object.

fields.description: Dotted paths summed (e.g. input + output tokens).

subtract.description: Dotted paths subtracted when present (e.g. a cached-input count).

aggregate.description: How matching events combine: sum (total every event) or last (default).

per_model_field.description: Dotted path to a per-model usage map (summed across every model).

per_model_tokens.description: Inner token field names summed for each per-model map value.

cost_field.description: Dotted path to the backend's reported run cost in USD; a list tries each in order (first resolving wins).

pattern.description: Regex whose summed capture groups yield the count (primary for regex source; a declared fallback for inline-json).

session_id_pattern.description: session-file: regex whose first group recovers the session id (validated as a strict UUID before use).

path_template.description: session-file: the session file path, with a {id} or {log} placeholder.

event.description: session-file: select the usage-bearing event by its event_field value.

event_field.description: session-file: the field naming an event's type (default 'type').

log_args.description: session-file: args appended so the backend logs usage to an engine-owned {log} path.

fallback.description: A nested usage spec tried when this source resolves nothing (chained).
